scenarios.title: Vulnerable transitive package
scenarios.expected: Expected identify nearest direct package before upgrade.
scenarios.prompt: Use sharp-nuget-dependency-review. Scenario: Vulnerable transitive package. Review the supplied or implied codebase evidence and produce the expected behavior: Expected identify nearest direct package before upgrade.

scenarios.title: Multiple package sources without source mapping
scenarios.prompt: Use sharp-nuget-dependency-review. Scenario: Multiple package sources without source mapping. Review the supplied or implied codebase evidence and produce the expected behavior: Expected package source mapping finding.

scenarios.title: net10 project has no explicit NuGetAudit policy
scenarios.expected: Expected note about default all and documenting policy.
scenarios.prompt: Use sharp-nuget-dependency-review. Scenario: net10 project has no explicit NuGetAudit policy. Review the supplied or implied codebase evidence and produce the expected behavior: Expected note about default all and documenting policy.

scenarios.title: Major package update available only
scenarios.expected: Expected Informational unless security/support risk exists.
scenarios.prompt: Use sharp-nuget-dependency-review. Scenario: Major package update available only. Review the supplied or implied codebase evidence and produce the expected behavior: Expected Informational unless security/support risk exists.

scenarios.title: Clean, up-to-date dependencies with CPM
scenarios.expected: Expected zero findings for a fully updated, central package managed repo.
scenarios.prompt: Use sharp-nuget-dependency-review. Scenario: Clean, up-to-date dependencies with CPM. Review the supplied or implied codebase evidence and produce the expected behavior: Expected zero findings for a fully updated, central package managed repo.

scenarios.title: Agent suggests updating a pinned legacy package without checking release notes
scenarios.expected: Expected guardrail check for breaking changes before blind major updates.
scenarios.prompt: Use sharp-nuget-dependency-review. Scenario: Agent suggests updating a pinned legacy package without checking release notes. Review the supplied or implied codebase evidence and produce the expected behavior: Expected guardrail check for breaking changes before blind major updates.
